prompt: Create a vertical full-body character portrait in delicate Chinese ink-wash mixed with soft anime illustration style on textured off-white rice paper. The subject is one graceful young woman named 清游, standing slightly turned toward the viewer with a calm, faintly melancholic expression, pale skin, icy blue eyes, and very long flowing silver-white hair. Her hair is loosely braided and partly pinned up with pale blue floral hair ornaments, with wispy strands drifting left as if in wind; she wears dangling blue bead earrings. Dress her in an ethereal ancient hanfu: layered white robes with subtle pale blue embroidery, translucent aqua-blue outer sleeves and shawl, a light blue patterned sash belt, small tassels and flower charms, and long flowing fabric that fades into watercolor washes near the bottom. Pose: one hand rests near her collarbone, the other hangs relaxed by her side. Background: minimalist monochrome ink landscape wash with exactly 2 bamboo clusters, one large dark bamboo cluster in the upper left and one smaller bamboo cluster on the right side, plus exactly 2 white blossom branches with dark twigs, one at the lower left and one at the lower right. Add grey ink splatters, misty washes, and soft floral textures without filling the background. On the upper right, include vertical black brush calligraphy with the large title 清游, one small red square seal beneath it, and a smaller vertical poem beside/below it reading 霜华宗双璧之一 清冷如雪 游刃如风. Use a refined pale palette of ice blue, white, grey, and muted black ink; keep linework fine, elegant, airy, and semi-transparent, with no modern objects, no border, no watermark, and no extra characters.
promptEn: Create a vertical full-body character portrait in delicate Chinese ink-wash mixed with soft anime illustration style on textured off-white rice paper. promptZh: 创作一幅竖版全身角色肖像，采用精致的中国水墨与柔和动漫插画混合风格，背景为纹理质感的米白色宣纸。主体是一位优雅的年轻女性，名为 清游，身体微侧面向观众，表情平静且略带忧郁，皮肤白皙，拥有冰蓝色的双眼，以及极长的 银白色 飘逸长发。她的头发松散地编织并部分盘起，饰有淡蓝色花朵发饰，几缕发丝随风飘动；佩戴着垂坠的蓝色珠子耳环。为她穿上飘逸的古风汉服：层叠的白色长袍，饰有淡蓝色刺绣，半透明的水蓝色外袖和披肩，浅蓝色花纹腰带，配有小流苏和花朵挂饰，长裙摆在底部渐变为水墨晕染效果。姿势：一只手轻放在锁骨附近，另一只手自然垂在身侧。背景：极简的单色水墨山水晕染，包含 2 丛竹子，左上方一丛较大的深色竹子，右侧一丛较小的竹子；以及 2 枝白色花枝，左下方和右下方各一枝，花枝带有深色枝干。添加灰色墨点、朦胧晕染和柔和的花卉纹理，但不要填满背景。在右上角，加入垂直的黑色毛笔书法，大标题为 清游，下方盖有一枚红色小方印，旁边或下方配有一段较小的竖排诗句，内容为 霜华宗双璧之一 清冷如雪 游刃如风。使用 冰蓝色、白色、灰色和柔和的黑墨色调；线条需精细、优雅、通透且半透明，画面中不得出现现代物品、边框、水印或额外角色。
